basics.name: Robin Fields
basics.label: Head of Product / Consumer Wellness Apps
summary: Consumer product leader with 12+ years building and scaling wellness, fitness, and habit-forming mobile apps used by millions across Europe and North America.
Currently Head of Product at Lumen Health, leading Product, Design, and Research for a subscription wellness platform, reporting to the CEO.
Track record of growing paid subscriptions by 40%, lifting 30-day retention by 18 points, and taking three consumer apps from concept to market leadership.
Experienced in subscription growth, personalization, behavioural design, experimentation, and building calm, accessible product experiences.
x_highlights: Launched a personalization engine that improved 30-day retention by 18 points across the flagship app.
Rebuilt onboarding and paywall experiments, growing trial-to-paid conversion by 26%.
Grew and led a cross-functional team of 22 across product, design, and user research.
Set the product vision behind two Editors' Choice features on the App Store.

work.name: Lumen Health
highlights: Lead Product, Design, and Research for a subscription wellness platform, reporting directly to the CEO.
Own the product strategy, roadmap, and quarterly planning across mobile, web, and the coaching backend.
Grew paid subscriptions by 40% in 18 months through pricing experiments and a redesigned onboarding flow.
Introduced a weekly experimentation cadence that now ships and measures 15+ A/B tests per quarter.

work.name: Verdant Apps
highlights: Owned the flagship habit-tracking app across iOS and Android, growing it to 3 million monthly active users.
Shipped a personalization engine that lifted 30-day retention by 18 points.
Partnered with data science to build a churn-prediction model that informed lifecycle messaging.
Led a squad of 6 engineers, 2 designers, and 1 researcher through discovery-to-delivery cycles.

work.name: Tidewell Studio
highlights: Launched a sleep and meditation app from zero to 500k downloads in its first year.
Ran the paywall and subscription experiments that grew trial-to-paid conversion by 26%.
Worked closely with content and audio teams to build a library of 200+ guided sessions.
Established the studio's first analytics stack and north-star metric framework.

work.name: NorthStar Labs
highlights: Supported a portfolio of consumer productivity apps as the first product hire.
Coordinated release cycles, user testing, and app-store optimization across three products.
Built the customer-feedback pipeline that fed the product roadmap.
